holdings.infoBox: AVEM is an equity ETF with a total of 3939 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 8.60%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.77%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR at 6.27%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.36%, and Tencent Holdings at 1.51%.

overview.description: The Avantis Emerging Markets Equity ETF (AVEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds emerging-market stocks of all market capitalizations considered favorable on multiple factors. The fund seeks to provide capital appreciation. AVEM was launched on Sep 17, 2019 and is issued by American Century Investments.
